action: Calls 5253h for a short probe, then branches on PA20.
evidence: OFFI PA,20h at 51F7 skips the 520Bh branch when PA20 is clear; 5204h calls 5253h. 5207h sends PA20 set to 520Bh and PA20 clear to 521Dh.
notes: Schematic review shows PA5 has a 15K pullup to +5 V, so clear means the line is pulled low; active HOME polarity still depends on the switch circuit.

pa20_condition: initial PA20 set, or PA20 set after the short probe
action: Calls 5253h for a long move. The following PA20 test must be clear or the routine enters the 53E1h error/reinitialization path.
evidence: 520Bh is reached from initial PA20 set or from 5207h when PA20 is set after the short probe. 5217h OFFI PA,20h skips the error jump only when PA20 is clear.
notes: This appears to seek across an edge before the 10-step confirmation move.

pa20_condition: PA20 clear after the long seek, or PA20 clear after the short probe
action: Calls 5253h for a 10-step move. The following PA20 test must be set or the routine enters the 53E1h error/reinitialization path.
vv61_or_control: A=FEh through CALT 00B8, A=02h through CALT 00BA; VV61=00h
evidence: 521Dh sets the control masks and VV61=00h before 5229h calls 5253h. 522Ch ONI PA,20h skips the error jump only when PA20 is set.
notes: This is the cleanest firmware match for a fixed edge-confirmation distance.

action: Calls 5253h for another long move. The following PA20 test must be clear; success seeds EF0F and EF11.
vv61_or_control: A=01h through CALT 00BA, A=FDh through CALT 00B8; VV61=C1h
evidence: 523Eh calls 5253h. 5241h OFFI PA,20h skips the error jump only when PA20 is clear. 5247h-524Eh stores 0003h to EF0F and EF11.
notes: Successful startup home seek leaves both the home/reference position and current position variables at 0003h.

pa20_condition: Called by all four motion stages
action: Selects 547Eh drive-current state, walks timing tables, pulses PC7/TM through 0908h, restores 546Ah hold current, then waits.
vv61_or_control: Uses VV61 bits to choose direction/table loops
evidence: 5253h calls 547Eh; 52FBh indexes timing words and calls 5306h before jumping to 0908h; 528Ch restores 546Ah hold current; 5287h/5294h load the 72AFh and 72B1h delay words.
notes: 72AFh/72B1h are 10 ms and 50 ms if interpreted as the same 10 us units as the adjacent carriage timing tables.

action: Splits the delay into three waits and samples PA20/PA5 after each third.
evidence: ONI PA,20h at 530Ch/5314h/531Ch skips the ADI D,1 when PA20 is set; therefore D increments only for PA20-clear samples. Since PA5 has a 15K pullup to +5 V, these are pulled-low samples.
notes: Caller tests D in the 5253h timing walk, so the startup seek uses a majority/consistency check instead of a single sample.

pa20_condition: success path and optional startup follow-up
action: Seeds EF0F/EF11 to 0003h after successful home seek; startup can call 5771h and then copy EF0F back to EF11.
evidence: 5247h stores 0003h to EF0F and EF11. After returning from 51F7h, startup calls 5771h when VV03.0 is set, clears VV0E.4, then copies EF0F to EF11 at 0359h-035Dh.
notes: 53B9h compares requested target HL against EF0F and only schedules motion when the difference is at most 001Ah; this may relate to the manual's 22-phase-switch print-area offset, but the exact 22-step mapping is not proven.
